# Simple Liturgy

> A focused, offline-ready web reader for the 1979 Book of Common Prayer Daily Office lectionary and daily prayers.

## Primary site

- [Simple Liturgy](https://simpleliturgy.com/): Open the reader and installable web app.

## What the app provides

- Daily Office citations for Psalms, Old Testament, New Testament, and Gospel readings.
- A prayer-first focus sequence followed by the readings and Gloria.
- Keyboard, touch, and swipe navigation with responsive portrait and landscape layouts.
- Offline access after the web app has been loaded or installed.

## Reference and source

- [BCP Online Daily Office Lectionary](https://www.bcponline.org/DOLectionary/dolectionary.html): Reference used for calendar and citation review.
- [Simple Liturgy source](https://github.com/parksmithh/simple-liturgy): Production website source.
- [Daily Office Reader staging source](https://github.com/parksmithh/daily-office-reader): Hardware, firmware, data, and staging web app development.

Simple Liturgy is an independent project and is not an official publication of The Episcopal Church or Church Publishing Incorporated.
